message:
Command `cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526

for SEQ in uart i2c spi timer pwm crc aes wwdt rtc; do
  RESULT=$(timeout 25 /tmp/test_${SEQ}.vvp 2>&1 | grep -E "PASS|FAIL|SMOKE_SUMMARY" | tail -3)
  echo "${SEQ^^}: ${RESULT}"
done` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526

for SEQ in uart i2c spi timer pwm crc aes wwdt rtc; do
  RESULT=$(timeout 25 /tmp/test_${SEQ}.vvp 2>&1 | grep -E "PASS|FAIL|SMOKE_SUMMARY" | tail -3)
  echo "${SEQ^^}: ${RESULT}"
done", "timeout": 300}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526

for SEQ in uart i2c spi timer pwm crc aes wwdt rtc; do
